description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6-alpine Docker image. Define a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache and cache the .cache/pip and venv/ directories. Include a before_script that runs apk update && apk upgrade, apk add build-base, python -m pip install --quiet --upgrade pip, prints python and pip versions, installs virtualenv, creates a venv, activates it, and installs -r requirements.txt and -r requirements-dev.txt. Add a single test stage with two jobs: pylint_test_job runs pylint pyramid_rlp, and pytest_test_job runs pytest --cov; both inherit the before_script. No artifacts, rules, or services are defined.
